form.formComment: Resuming after a five-and-a-half months break. Finished off last campaign second of 9 at this track Cl1 October 31 over 1400m, soft track; 0.8 len behind Sky Eagle carrying 58kg at $3.70. On debut fifth of 10 at Devonport Synthetic Mdn-Sw August 17 over 1009m, 1.0 len behind Munich Marble carrying 56.5kg at $1.60. Has upside and despite the tricky draw can go close fresh.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid out in the home straight.

form.formComment: At the latest run won by 1.5 len at this track Mdn-Sw March 27 over 1200m on a soft track defeating Francium with 56.5kg at $10. The race before that came home strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 9 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 4 over 1220m, slow going 2 len behind Woolclasser carrying 56.5kg at $19. In winning form but harder here and has a tricky draw.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up 3rd of 10 at Devonport Synthetic Mdn-Sw on March 9 over 1009m, 2.75 len behind Just Plain Nuts carrying 56.5kg at $3.70. Second-up won by 2 len at Hobart Mdn-Sw March 22 over 1100m defeating Black Raptor carrying 56.5kg at $3.60. Profiles nicely. Has found winning form and expect another forward showing.
